items.briefing:
Deepfake scams are a growing concern, and Bitdefender has released a free app called RealCheck to help people identify AI-generated images and videos — useful for anyone suspicious of misleading content online. Meanwhile, document fraud in Australia and New Zealand is being targeted by a new partnership between Experian and Resistant AI, aimed at detecting fake identity documents used in financial fraud.

Mac users should be aware of a newly identified security gap in macOS that can allow security tools to be disabled without administrator knowledge — ensure your device is kept up to date.

**Practical tip:** If you use a Mac for work, check with your IT team that your security software is active and hasn't been tampered with.

featured.title: ASD to retire Essential Eight within two years, consults on replacement
featured.quote: Australia's cybersecurity framework undergoes major overhaul as ASD retires Essential Eight guidance.
